label: ← Back to Pipeline
expected_behavior: Routes back to the CRM/kanban view via goTo('crm'); switches active view from #view-prospects to #view-crm.
notes: Header back-link inside tpl-view-prospects template.

label: 🚪 D2D Tracker
expected_behavior: goTo('d2d') — navigates to the Door-to-Door tracker view (map + knock log).

label: ＋ New Knock
expected_behavior: Calls window.openD2DOrGo() — opens the D2D quick-knock capture if window.D2D is loaded, otherwise routes to the d2d view to log a new door knock (which can auto-create a prospect lead).
notes: Primary CTA in the header. Verify openD2DOrGo is in _NBD_CALL_ALLOWLIST (dashboard-state.js).

label: Total (stat tile)
expected_behavior: renderStats() onClick: sets state.bucketFilter='all', saveState, render() — clears bucket filter and shows all prospects across hot/warm/cold. Tile shows total prospect count and active styling when bucketFilter==='all'.
notes: Stat tiles double as bucket filter pills.

label: Hot (stat tile)
expected_behavior: Sets state.bucketFilter='hot', saveState, render() — filters board/list to HOT_DISPS (interested, storm_damage, callback). Tile value = count of hot-bucket prospects.

label: Warm (stat tile)
expected_behavior: Sets state.bucketFilter='warm', saveState, render() — filters to WARM_DISPS (ins_has_claim, ins_needs_file, ins_denied, come_back, left_material).

label: Cold (stat tile)
expected_behavior: Sets state.bucketFilter='cold', saveState, render() — filters to COLD_DISPS (not_home, not_interested, tenant, vacant, cold_dead, do_not_knock, other).

label: Conv. Rate / last 90 days
expected_behavior: Display-only tile (no click handler — has no data-bucket attribute so the click wiring skips it). Shows computeStats().convRate = promoted Door-to-Door leads / all D2D leads created in last 90d, as a percentage.
notes: Read-only metric; included for completeness — not interactive.

label: Age filter (Any age / Fresh <7d / 7-14d / 14-30d / 30d+)
expected_behavior: On change: state.age = value, saveState, render(). applyFilters keeps only prospects whose ageBucket(ageInDays) === selected ('fresh'<7d, 'warm'7-14d, 'cold'14-30d, 'ice'30d+).

label: Attempts filter (Any / 1st knock / 2nd knock / 3+ knocks)
expected_behavior: On change: state.attempts = value, saveState, render(). applyFilters matches attemptCount() (parsed from 'D2D Knock #N' in notes); '3' means >=3, otherwise exact match.

label: Rep filter (All reps / per-rep)
expected_behavior: On change: state.rep = value, saveState, render(). applyFilters keeps only prospects with userId===rep. Options built from collectReps() (distinct userId+repName across _leads).
notes: Only rendered when role is admin/owner or role is unset (showRepFilter). Hidden entirely for sales_rep (who also see only their own prospects per applyFilters:129-131).

label: Follow-up due (checkbox)
expected_behavior: On change: state.followUpDue = checked, saveState, render(). When checked, applyFilters keeps only prospects whose lead.followUp date is in the past (isFollowUpDue).

label: Show hidden (checkbox)
expected_behavior: On change: state.showHidden = checked, saveState, render(). When unchecked (default), applyFilters excludes prospects with prospectHidden===true; when checked, soft-hidden prospects reappear.
notes: Pairs with the Hide/Unhide quick-action (toggleProspectHidden writes prospectHidden).

label: ▦ Kanban (view toggle)
expected_behavior: onClick: state.view='kanban', saveState, render() → renderKanban() groups filtered prospects into disposition columns (color-coded, with attempt/age/photo cards).
notes: Half of the kanban-vs-list toggle the critic called out.

label: ≡ List (view toggle)
expected_behavior: onClick: state.view='list', saveState, render() → renderList() shows filtered prospects sorted by age ascending as flat rows (address, disposition chip, knock #, age, follow-up-due badge).
notes: List view is sort-by-age only (no user-facing sort control); the only 'sort' in the gap is this implicit age-ascending order.

label: Prospect card (kanban)
expected_behavior: wireCardClicks: onClick opens window.openCardDetailModal(leadId) — the shared lead-detail modal, which for a prospect shows the orange Promote banner + quick-actions row. Toast 'Lead detail not loaded yet' if modal fn missing.
notes: Each card is the entry point to per-prospect actions (promote/hide/delete live in the modal).

label: Prospect row (list)
expected_behavior: wireCardClicks: onClick opens window.openCardDetailModal(leadId) — same shared modal as the kanban card.

label: Review (stale-prospect banner)
expected_behavior: data-pr-action delegate calls Prospects.reviewStale(): sets state.age='ice' (30d+), saveState, dismisses banner for session, render(), and toasts 'Filtered to 30d+ prospects — Hide or Delete the dead ones'.
reveal_state: after:>=1 prospect older than 60d (auto-shows, once per session)
notes: Banner only appears when staleCount()>=1 and not dismissed this session (sessionStorage nbd_prospects_stale_dismissed_v1).

label: Not now (stale-prospect banner)
expected_behavior: data-pr-action delegate calls Prospects.dismissStale(): writes sessionStorage flag '1' and re-renders the banner (hiding it for the rest of the session). Does NOT change filters.

label: 📊 Conversion Analytics — last 90 days (collapsible)
expected_behavior: Native <details>/<summary> expand-collapse. Body shows promotion rate by disposition (top 6) and by knock attempt (1st/2nd/3+). Auto-open when total D2D leads in 90d >=5. No-op render when zero D2D leads.
notes: Display-only analytics; bars are not clickable.

label: ✓ Promote to Customer
expected_behavior: data-action=call data-fn=cdaConfirmPromote → cdaConfirmPromote() calls confirmPromoteProspect(window._cardDetailLeadId). Opens a single confirm dialog (see -022); on confirm calls promoteProspect() which flips isProspect=false + serverTimestamp, then closeCardDetailModal(). Lead moves from Prospects page into the kanban as a real customer.
source_ref: dashboard.html:12627 (+ dashboard-actions.js:243 cdaConfirmPromote, :1376 confirmPromoteProspect; promoteProspect crm-portal-bridge.js:628)
notes: State-changing promotion (writes the lead live into the customer pipeline). Banner is hidden via inline display:none until a prospect lead opens. Verify cdaConfirmPromote in _NBD_CALL_ALLOWLIST (dashboard-state.js:231 — confirmed present).

label: Promote (confirm-dialog OK)
expected_behavior: Themed in-app confirm (D2D.uiConfirm → uiConfirm → native confirm fallback). Message: 'Promote <name> to a full customer? This adds them to your kanban as a real lead and removes them from the Prospects page.' Clicking Promote resolves true → promoteProspect runs.
notes: Confirm control captured as its own row per the gap brief.

label: Cancel (promote confirm-dialog)
expected_behavior: Resolves false; confirmPromoteProspect returns without calling promoteProspect — lead stays a prospect, modal stays open.

label: 📞 Call
expected_behavior: populateProspectQuickActions: onClick sets window.location.href='tel:'+digits-only phone. Disabled (greyed, no handler) when lead has no phone.
notes: Quick-actions row injected via createElement (no inline HTML).

label: 💬 Text
expected_behavior: onClick sets window.location.href='sms:'+digits-only phone. Disabled when no phone.
notes: Opens native SMS app; does not send anything automatically.

label: ✉️ Email
expected_behavior: onClick sets window.location.href='mailto:'+email. Disabled when lead has no email.
notes: Opens native mail composer; does not send.

label: 🚪 Re-knock
expected_behavior: onClick: closeCardDetailModal() then window.D2D.openQuickKnock({address,lat,lng}) prefilled from the lead; falls back to goTo('d2d') if D2D engine not loaded.
notes: Always enabled (no disable condition).

label: 🗺️ See on Map
expected_behavior: onClick: closeCardDetailModal() then window.viewProspectOnMap(lead.id) → goTo('d2d') and flies the D2D map to lead.lat/lng (D2D.flyTo or _d2dMap.setView zoom 17). Disabled when lead has no lat/lng; viewProspectOnMap also toasts 'No coordinates' as a guard.

label: 🗄️ Hide / 👁️ Unhide
expected_behavior: onClick: window.toggleProspectHidden(lead.id) — flips prospectHidden via updateDoc (soft-hide, record kept), toasts 'Prospect hidden'/'Prospect visible', closes modal, refreshes Prospects view. Label/icon reflect current isHidden state.
notes: Soft-hide writes prospectHidden:true — pairs with the 'Show hidden' filter (gap-prospects-013).

label: 🗑️ Delete
expected_behavior: onClick: window.absoluteDeleteProspect(lead.id). Hard guard refuses if lead.isProspect!==true (toast 'Cannot permanent-delete a customer — use Trash instead'). Otherwise launches the 3-step destructive flow (-031,-032,-033). On full confirm: deleteDoc, splice from window._leads, toast 'Permanently deleted', close modal, refresh, dispatch leadsChanged. PERMANENT — no trash recovery.
notes: Hard-delete reserved for prospects only; styled red (danger). Distinct from the customer soft-delete/trash flow.

label: Continue (delete step 1)
expected_behavior: First of three gates. Message: 'Permanently delete <name>? ... The record will be ERASED — no recovery from trash. Use Hide if you just want to clear them from the view.' Continue → proceed to step 2; Cancel → abort.
notes: Confirm control captured as its own row per gap brief.

label: I'm sure (delete step 2)
expected_behavior: Second gate. Message: 'Are you ABSOLUTELY sure? Last chance to back out before the final confirmation. Click Cancel to keep them as a hidden prospect instead.' I'm sure → proceed to typed gate; Cancel → abort.

label: Type DELETE (delete step 3, typed gate)
expected_behavior: Final typed gate via _prospectPrompt (D2D.uiPrompt → uiPrompt → native prompt). Message: 'Type DELETE in all caps to permanently remove <name>. Anything else cancels.' Only the exact string 'DELETE' proceeds to deleteDoc; any other value toasts 'Delete cancelled' and aborts.
notes: Typed-confirmation input captured as its own row per gap brief.

label: 🎲 Load Sample Data
expected_behavior: data-action=call data-fn=loadSampleData → loadSampleData() (must be signed in, else toast 'Please sign in first'). Writes a set of demo lead docs (Sarah Martinez, Michael Chen, Jennifer Williams, ...) to the leads collection for the current user/company so the kanban has data.
reveal_state: after:kanban fails to load (#crmDiagnostic display:none until shown)
notes: Writes live sample lead documents — not destructive but pollutes the real leads collection; flag for QA cleanup. Diagnostic panel itself is hidden by default and only surfaces on a load failure.

label: 🔄 Retry Load
expected_behavior: data-fn=retryLoadLeads → retryLoadLeads(): sets crmHealthBadge to 'loading', toasts 'Retrying CRM data load...', re-invokes loadLeads().

label: 🔐 Test Rules
expected_behavior: data-fn=testFirestoreRules → testFirestoreRules() (requires auth). Runs 5 live probes: read leads, WRITE a temp lead (_test:true), DELETE that temp doc, read estimates, read photos. Results written to #crmDiagnosticDetails + console; toasts pass/fail. On permission-denied shows rules-fix guidance.
notes: Self-cleaning: it creates and immediately deletes one _test lead doc. If the delete step fails (rules block), a stray _test lead can remain — flag for QA verification.

label: 📋 Copy Debug Info
expected_behavior: data-fn=copyDebugInfo → copyDebugInfo(): builds a debug block (user email/uid, db connected, auth state, leads-in-memory count, captured console logs) and navigator.clipboard.writeText; toast '✅ Debug info copied' / '❌ Failed to copy' (logs to console on failure).
notes: Copies user email + UID to clipboard — minor PII surface, no server write.

label: ▶ Show Debug Console (toggle)
expected_behavior: data-action=toggle flips #debugConsole visibility (display none/block) to reveal the captured console-log feed (#debugConsoleContent). The ▶ caret (#debugConsoleToggle) indicates state.
notes: Generic toggle action; debug feed populated by the console-capture hook in dashboard-bootstrap.module.js.

label: ✕ Dismiss
expected_behavior: data-action=hideEl sets #crmDiagnostic display:none, dismissing the diagnostic panel for the session (does not fix or reload anything).
